arts.ttl: Tottenham drop huge Micky van de Ven injury return hint before Fulham clash
arts.sum: Tottenham have provided a major injury update on Micky van de Ven before the Premier League clash at home to Fulham. Since joining in the summer of 2023, Van de Ven has been hit by three separate hamstring injuries that has thus far seen him miss 15 games and counting.

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski backs Tottenham teammate to make a difference after huge injury blow
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski has backed Fraser Forster to step up and contribute to Tottenham Hotspur’s Premier League campaign after Guglielmo Vicario was ruled out for the rest of the year upon undergoing surgery. Brandon Austin, yet to make his first-team debut for Spurs, will likely make the bench for a second Premier League game this season, having been included in every Europa League matchday squad.

arts.ttl: Marco Silva has told Fulham squad what they must do to beat Tottenham as injury news confirmed
arts.sum: Spurs, who powered to a dominant 4-0 win at Manchester City last weekend, will be difficult opponents in the eyes of the Fulham boss. Silva will be without summer signing Joachim Andersen for their trip to north London after the centre-back was substituted with an injury during last week’s defeat.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham in Liverpool transfer 'battle' as surprise Real Madrid twist emerges
arts.sum: Despite only signing Geertruida in the summer, Leipzig are reported to have put a €45million (£37.4million) price tag on the versatile defender ahead of the January transfer window. Mikel Arteta and Ange Postecoglou will have both been assessing their respective squads this season and decisions are expected to be made on whether Arsenal or Tottenham will dip into the transfer market in the New Year.

arts.ttl: Liverpool or Tottenham transfer would be 'very stupid', club slammed as Reds target admits 2025 exit is likely
arts.sum: Liverpool or Spurs could sign the youngster for free..

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Fulham predictions: Spurs to maintain home dominance
arts.sum: Spurs host Fulham at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday and Will Maxwell believes that the home side should be able to see off the visitors in an entertaining London derby.

arts.ttl: Ex-Tottenham player was better than Ballon d’Or winner, claims England icon
arts.sum: Former Welsh international Gareth Bale is widely regarded as one of the best players to have played for Tottenham. Former Premier League and England star, Steve McManaman has now claimed that the former Tottenham and Real Madrid attacker was a better player compared to the likes of Vinicius Junior, Neymar, Mohamed Salah, Arjen Robben, and […] The post Ex-Tottenham player was better than Ballon d’Or winner, claims England icon appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: How Dejan Kulusevski became the Premier League’s marathon man
arts.sum: Totteham’s Swedish star has developed into a midfield monster, combining creativity with mental and physical strength

arts.ttl: Vanoli reunites with ‘proud’ Conte after Tottenham snub
arts.sum: Antonio Conte and Paolo Vanoli will reunite in Torino-Napoli tomorrow after working for several years...

arts.ttl: Man United to compete with Tottenham and Aston Villa for 12-G/A attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham Hotspur and Aston Villa are interested in signing the PSV Eindhoven attacker Malik Tillman. According to Sky Germany, the player has attracted the attention of the three Premier League clubs with his performances for the Dutch outfit and they could look to make a move for him in the near future.
